story.title: Flight of Frenemies
story.logline: When a mischievous cat and mouse duo hijack a commercial plane, it's up to its no-nonsense pilot Owais to keep them in line and the passengers safe.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: Meet our unlikely heroes, Tom and Jerry, and their adversary, Owais, who must balance his duty as a pilot with the chaos caused by the duo's antics.

acts.label: Rising Action
acts.description: As the plane hits turbulence, Tom and Jerry's mischief escalates, testing Owais's patience and Ariba's hospitality skills, while also putting the passengers at risk.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: With the plane on the verge of disaster, Owais must use his quick thinking and Ariba's help to outsmart Tom and Jerry and land the plane safely.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: The passengers breathe a sigh of relief as the plane touches down safely, and Owais reflects on the unexpected lessons learned from his adventure with Tom and Jerry.

story.world: A commercial airplane is filled with passengers, hosted by the charming Ariba, while Owais tries to keep the chaotic duo of Tom and Jerry from causing a catastrophe.
